title: streptanthus longirostris
intro: Streptanthus longirostris, also known as long-beaked jewelflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Streptanthus longirostris are said to include relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
